title: Numbers
description: You are to write a program, which, given N positive integer values X1, X2, ..., XN, computes the smallest number Xi that appears in the sequence at least as many times as any other number.
input: The first line contains a single integer N. Line i+1 (for i = 1, 2, ..., N) contains one integer Xi.
output: The first line is to contain one integer, the smallest number to appear at least as many times as any other number.
source: Olympiad, International Olympiad in Informatics, IOI 2004, Practice
